name: SmythOS
description: SmythOS — multi-agent AI platform with visual builder. Deploy teams of autonomous agents that plan, use tools, and collaborate on business tasks.

seo.title: SmythOS — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: SmythOS: SmythOS — multi-agent AI platform with visual builder. Deploy teams of autonomous agents that plan, use tools, and collaborate on business tasks.

when_to_use: Orchestrating multi-agent pipelines with state and memory mgmt
Deploying collaborative AI agents that delegate to specialized agents
Managing agent-to-agent communication in production workflows
Building complex agent swarms for research and analysis tasks

pros: Visual multi-agent builder out of the box
Agents can plan, call tools and collaborate
cons: Visual flows hit a wall at real complexity
review.verdict: Pleasant agent canvas for business automations, but serious agent teams will prefer code-first frameworks.
review.best_for: Ops teams automating internal workflows with non-engineers in the loop
review.not_for: Engineering teams building complex agent graphs that need code-level control
